element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Foundation mechanic for beat-'em-up stages throughout game
Dropped by enemies; replaced when new weapon picked up
Select button to draw/withdraw; can pick up in beat-'em-up stages
Chicken drumstick for health refill; body armor reduces damage
Occasional encounters mixed with human enemies
Optional Zapper support; ammo/health management critical
Time pressure; single collision = instant life loss; no health gauge
B button attacks airborne enemies; paired with shooting mechanic
Extends time limit in driving stages

typical_relief_triggers: Safe zones between enemy clusters in beat-'em-up stages
typical_tension_triggers: Entering new beat-'em-up stage with aggressive enemies
Rail shooting stage with limited ammo
Single-hit death mechanic in vehicle stages
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: High-intensity action with alternating gameplay paradigms; beat-'em-up stages allow resource management recovery, while shooting and driving stages create artificial time pressure and one-hit-death tension

difficulty_curve.early_game: Moderate beat-'em-up combat in swamplands; basic enemy patterns with weapon pickups available
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalates to rail shooting (Stage 2) and vehicular freeway combat (Stages 4-5) with increased artificial difficulty from time pressure and instant-death mechanics
difficulty_curve.late_game: Final stages return to beat-'em-up format leading to Godfather Gordon boss encounter at estate
notable_spikes: Stage 2 transition to rail shooting format with ammo scarcity
Stage 4-5 vehicular combat with instant-life-loss collision mechanic and time pressure
NES version deliberately harder than Famicom: more aggressive enemies, increased enemy health, narrower driving roads, reduced starting ammo in shooting stages

notable_level_patterns.description: Game cycles through three distinct gameplay modes: side-scrolling beat-'em-up (Stages 1, 3, 6, 8, 9), rail shooting first-person (Stages 2, 7), vehicular driving (Stages 4, 5). Each paradigm requires different control scheme and decision-making.

notable_level_patterns.pattern_name: Spatial progression from wilderness to urban
notable_level_patterns.description: Game narratively progresses from Louisiana bayous/swamplands through grasslands and suburbs to New Orleans and Godfather Gordon's estate, tracking spatial geography of pursuit
Each stage culminates in boss encounter before advancing; defeating boss opens path to next stage and narrative progression
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Stages 1-9 each end with distinct boss
